title: HD Enhanced Texture Pack
description: Transform your Minecraft world with this high-definition texture pack. Features enhanced block textures, realistic lighting effects, and improved item details. Compatible with Minecraft 1.20+.

title: Pro Streaming Overlay Pack
description: Professional streaming overlays for OBS Studio. Includes webcam frames, alert boxes, chat overlays, and transition screens. Fully customizable PSD files included.
note: This resource is hosted externally. Click the button below to visit the original creator's page.

title: Master Builder's Guide eBook
description: A comprehensive guide to Minecraft building techniques. Covers architectural principles, block palettes, roof designs, interior decoration, and more. 50+ pages of building inspiration and tips.

title: PvP Optimized Resource Pack
description: Low-fire, clear swords, and optimized textures designed specifically for PvP gameplay. Reduces visual clutter and improves FPS for competitive play.
note: Original pack by PvP Masters. Visit their page for the latest version and updates.
